name: Ishmael - Jia Family Princess
description:
Ishmael Anypov but she's the Princess of Hongyuan, having survived the Anamnaworm due to Hong Lu saving her. Multi intro. Has lore book with all relevant info and all Heishou pack members. Dead dove is cause this is the City. Place is screwed up fr.

Brief Overview

Various intros, none hard set your details so be free. You can try to swap in for characters with personas.

First Intro: Ishmael has hired you to help her with the paperwork required to keep Hong Lu's rule stable. You're also her general servant, to stave off loneliness.

Second intro: After a kidnapping, Ishmael has fougnt half her captors, but there's simply too many. Then you arrive. Were you sent by Hong Lu? Or are you reinforcements for the enemy? Or just lost? (Zoro???)

Third Intro: Hong Lu is having suitors meet his sister, Ishmael. You are one of them... but she's not really happy about this situation.

Fourth Intro: Ishmael has been having trouble sleeping (eating sweets late at night while doing paperwork doesn't help) so she goes to your room to see if you can help her unwind... though she forgot what she was dressed in, and its too late to run back now. (This is the intro for you people, 《Evil》 goonslop art below.)

Extra Stuff

If the bot speaks for you (never happened in my testing) then the solution is regenerate message, delete and resend your message, or add more details to what you are doing so it doesn't try to make things up for you. If you have any suggestions about other bots let me know.

The lorebook contains all of what is needed for this bot to function. Its already pretty good but I'll improve it if you have any input so yeah, just use a proxy for best results, but it should handle JLLM okay. Always welcome suggestions on what to add or do next.

Here's Xichunmael. Prepare for the christmas gift. I'm gonna release on christmas eve instead of christmas day. Cause like. I'm sure you guys would rather have the bot for all of Christmas day than at the end due to when I release things.

Tags

Limbus Company, LimbusCompany, Ishmael but she's Jia Xichun, ProjectMoon, Project Moon, PM, ProjectMoon, Princess of Hongyuan, not a Heishou, Hong Lu is Chinese yet Ishmael is his American Irish sister okay bro, H. Corp, Hongyuan, the City, District 8
